title: rosa platyacantha subsp. crassipes
intro: Rosa platyacantha subsp. crassipes, also known as the prickly rose, is a species of rose plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues, skin problems, and fever. The health benefits of Rosa platyacantha subsp. crassipes include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
